zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mowbray於1399年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk33歲，母親Elizabeth FitzAlan33歲。她於1420年2月21日之後與Sir Robert Howard在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年10月在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年60歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Mowbray于1399年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk33岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzAlan33岁。她于1420年2月21日之后与Sir Robert Howard在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年10月在英国英格兰素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年60岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mowbray was born in 1399, in England, her father, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzAlan, was 33. She married Sir Robert Howard after 21 February 1420, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died in October 1459, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mowbray est née en 1399, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzAlan, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Howard après 21 février 1420, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1459, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Suffolk, Angleterre.

Februar 1420 in England Sir Robert Howard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1459 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Robert Howard dopo il 21 febbraio 1420, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mowbray(이)가 1399년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzAlan(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1420년 2월 21일 이후 영국에서 Sir Robert Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mowbray nasceu em 1399, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzAlan, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Howard após 21 de fevereiro de 1420, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1459, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mowbray родилась в 1399 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzAlan, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Howard после 21 февраль 1420 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла октябрь 1459 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности суффолк, Англия.
